---
title: "Sample Op-ed — Delete This"
date: "2025-01-15"
description: "Mint"
categories:
  - Technology Policy
publication: "Mint"
publication-url: "https://livemint.com/replace-with-actual-url"
excerpt: true
draft: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="op-ed-source">
  <div class="op-ed-source-label">Originally published in</div>
  <div class="op-ed-source-pub">Mint</div>
  <a href="https://livemint.com/replace-with-actual-url" class="op-ed-source-link" target="_blank">Read original →</a>
</div>
```

Your article text goes here. Paste it from the newspaper or write it fresh. You can include the full text or just an excerpt — whichever makes sense given the publication's terms.

Paragraph two of the article. The text will render in the same editorial serif style as the blog.

<!-- If this is an excerpt, replace the URL below and uncomment: -->
<!--
::: {.read-more-box}
*Excerpt only — the article continues at the original publication.*

[Read the full article at Mint →](https://livemint.com/replace-with-actual-url){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::
-->
